title: The Hindi Sahitya Sammelan Act, 1962
full_text: The Hindi Sahitya Sammelan Act, 1962 हिन्‍दी साहित्‍य सम्‍मेलन अधिनियम,1962 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196213 Act Number: 13 Enactment Date: 1962-03-30 Act Year: 1962 Short Title: The Hindi Sahitya Sammelan Act, 1962 Hindi Title: हिन्‍दी साहित्‍य सम्‍मेलन अधिनियम,1962 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Hindi Sahitya Sammelan having its head office at Allahabad to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 28-06-1962 Notification: 28th June, 1962, vide notification No. S.O. 1954(E), dated 25th June, 1962, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Hindi Sahitya Sammelan Act, 1962 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration of the Hindi Sahitya Sammelan as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation. Section 5. Effect of incorporation of Sammelan. Section 6. Functions of Sammelan. Section 7. Governing Body. Section 8. First Governing Body and its duties. Section 9. Term of office and procedure of first Governing Body and allowances payable to members thereof. Section 10. First Governing Body to take over management of properties of Sammelan. Section 11. Determination of first members. Section 12. Rules to be made by the first Governing Body. Section 13. Elections to Governing Body. Section 14. Dissolution of first Governing Body. Section 15. Fund of the Sammelan. Section 16. Accounts and audit. Section 17. Power to make rule. Section 18. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies, etc. Section 19. Power to remove difficulties.
